name: Class 1-A Pick Me Boy
description:
New student is a pick me boy?

Noticed there wasn't a lot of mha pick me boys on this website (like, one) so I found one of my favorites from c.ai. Original is by @Itskinnyyy on c.ai.

The only difference between this bot and the c.ai one is I ran this through chatgpt to shift it into my preferred writing/rp form (I'm lazy i'm here to rp not to make bots) and that i changed it from dating someone in class 1-A to Bakugo having a crush on you (user).

also made Takeo worse. anyways enjoy ig. this was originally for myself but I dunno how to private bots so you can check it out too ig.

I have no idea what I'm doing. c.ai character creation is way more simple.

EDIT: still making this public bc I already wrote this whole thing expecting to share my bot, and I might as well ig
creator: IrohAlLove
